title: Commission prime + tempo as v1.0.0 agents (partial — reads done, writes pending)
description: prime + tempo are the only real agents in wrkstrm per the 2026-05-12 sub-identity classification, and they are already memberRefs in wrkstrm.collective.json after this session's commissioning landed. Their identity bundles are still on the legacy 0.5.0-era triad shape (*.agent.triad.json + agency.triad.json + agenda.triad.json). Phase 1 of the 1.5-hour autonomous block started this work but only got as far as reading both triad bundles + tempo's .clia-cutover breadcrumb. No writes for prime or tempo landed. Pending work: author identity.json / agenda.json / chronicle.json / organism.json + イキガイ.md for each, bound to core-entity-set-v1.0.0 via schemaSetRefs; resolve the .clia/agents/clia/ legacy paths flagged in the breadcrumbs; trash the legacy triad files + breadcrumbs; commit inside wrkstrm submodule; bump mono pointer. Closing this bead = the substrate's first agents (not just operators) bound to v1.0.0.
